Trademark

The palmshed sdk mark is part of the project identity. This page records the symbol and usage guidelines.

Purpose

This page states that the mark is a trademark of palmshed sdk, shows that we publicly claim the brand, and links to permission details for reuse.

Usage rules

  • Only the stylized leaf mark shown on this site is claimed.
  • Do not modify, recolor, animate, or repurpose the mark without written permission.
  • Commercial use requires advance approval. See the Contact page.

Status

The mark is noted as ™ until registration is obtained, after which ® may be used.

Found something unexpected? Report an issue.
